Agentic Services

Enterprise · Managed by Adelphos

AI Finances

Automated bookkeeping, invoicing and cash-flow forecasting — driven by your live project data. Adelphos monitors your project accounts in real time, reconciles incoming invoices against purchase orders, and generates monthly management accounts without manual data entry. The agent flags anomalies before they become problems and produces cash-flow forecasts based on your programme milestones.

  • Automated Reconciliation — Matches invoices to POs and flags discrepancies within minutes
  • Cash-flow Forecasting — Rolling 12-month forecast tied to your programme milestones
  • Management Accounts — Monthly packs generated from live data — no spreadsheet assembly
  • Anomaly Detection — Agent surfaces duplicate invoices, unusual line items, and budget overruns
  • Audit Trail — Every transaction logged with full provenance for compliance
Available on the Enterprise tier Open AI Finances →
1Ask Jason in Adelphos Chat or @Jason in Teams
2Agent reconciles invoices against POs in real time
3See cashflow, upcoming payments, risk of missed deadlines
4Monthly management accounts generated — ready for sign-off
5Fee proposals auto-drafted from your job history & win/loss data
